description: Horizontal graphic in the DHS '#PetPreparedness' template. Cream-beige background with a faint repeating pattern of dog-bone, fish, and paw-print line art. Top-left brown rounded banner with white serif text 'Pet Preparedness Tips.' Dark sans-serif body text reads: 'My 90lb 9-year-old Doberman, Helios, has quite the kit! For the day-to-day (walks and brewery trips) he has a folding bowl, a Nalgene for water, doggie-safe sunscreen, a cooling vest, a packable Ruffwear travel bed, his step-count tracking Fi collar, poop bags, and some snacks (this helps him do some training, helps him to behave when there are distractions, and helps get big smiles for photo ops!).' On the right is a rounded color photo of a smiling woman in sunglasses and a brown T-shirt outdoors on grass next to a tan Doberman with its mouth open. Below the photo, black serif text reads 'Ashley P. & Helios,' with a teal accent line, 'CISA' and 'Section Chief, Planning and Coordination.' The DHS seal is at bottom-right.
notable_text: Pet Preparedness Tips; Ashley P. & Helios; CISA; Section Chief, Planning and Coordination
